nasb.text: Again you will plant vineyards On the hills of Samaria; The planters will plant And will enjoy them.

esv.text: Again you shall plant vineyards on the mountains of Samaria; the planters shall plant and shall enjoy the fruit.

cnv.text: 你要再次在撒瑪利亞的眾山上栽種葡萄園， 栽種的人栽種了，必可享用所結的果子。

ccb.text: 你们将在撒玛利亚的山上重新栽种葡萄园， 享受园中的果实。
